# Add lint command

Read `AGENTS.md` first. Keep changes minimal, task-scoped, and easy to verify.

## Objective

Add a lint command to the fixture CLI and update the docs.

## Read First

- `AGENTS.md`
- `README.md`

## Relevant Paths

- `src`
- `tests`

## Constraints

- Keep the CLI local-first.
- Prefer small, reviewable changes.
- Run build, test, and lint before finishing.
- Update tests if command behavior changes.

## Validation

- `npm run build`
- `npm run test`
- `npm run lint`

## Done When

- The lint command exists.
- The docs mention the lint command.

## Notes

- Repository root is .
- Package manager is npm.
- Primary languages include json, markdown, typescript.
